ConnectionStrings._comment: Development uses SQLite. Production uses Azure SQL via ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Production. Override with env var: ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection

Jwt._comment: Override Jwt__Secret via environment variable in production. Minimum 32 characters required.

AzureOpenAI._comment: Replace with your Azure OpenAI resource values. Override with env vars: AzureOpenAI__Endpoint, AzureOpenAI__ApiKey, AzureOpenAI__EmbeddingDeploymentName, AzureOpenAI__ChatDeploymentName

AzureAISearch._comment: Replace with your Azure AI Search resource values. Override with env vars: AzureAISearch__Endpoint, AzureAISearch__ApiKey, AzureAISearch__IndexName

AzureBlobStorage._comment: Only used in Production. Override with env vars: AzureBlobStorage__ConnectionString, AzureBlobStorage__ContainerName

Cors._comment: Override with env var: Cors__AllowedOrigins__0, Cors__AllowedOrigins__1, etc.

Chat.SystemPrompt: You are a helpful assistant. Answer questions based on the provided context. If the context does not contain relevant information, say so clearly. Always cite your sources by referencing the document name.
